issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts for the remainder of your turn, not until end of turn.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action is completely unsupported by card text. Card only grants −5 cost to opponent's Characters during this turn. No KO effect exists.
Target should include 'maxAmount':1 to match 'up to 1' in the text.
